---
name: Bug report
about: Something broke or produced a wrong result
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What happened

<!-- One or two sentences. What did you run, what did you expect, what did you get? -->

## Reproduction

**Command:**

```bash
jitcatch <subcommand> <args>
```

**Minimal diff / repo:**

<!-- Paste the smallest diff that reproduces. A link to a public repo + commit SHA is ideal. -->

## Environment

- JitCatch version / commit SHA:
- Python version: `python --version`
- OS: (macOS 14 / Ubuntu 22.04 / …)
- Provider + model: (e.g. `ollama qwen2.5-coder:7b`)

## Report output

<!-- If a run completed, attach or paste .jitcatch/output/<name>.json. Redact any sensitive code. -->

## Logs

## Additional context
